metadata.chunk:
Article 26
                    Laws inconsistent with fundamental rights
                    All existing laws inconsistent with the provisions of this Part shall become void to the extent of such inconsistency.
metadata.title: Laws inconsistent with fundamental rights

metadata.chunk:
Article 27
                    Equality before law
                    All citizens are equal before law and are entitled to equal protection of law.
metadata.title: Equality before law

metadata.chunk:
Article 28(1)
                    Non-discrimination
                    The State shall not discriminate against any citizen on grounds only of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth.
metadata.title: Non-discrimination

metadata.chunk:
Article 28(2)
                    Equal rights for women
                    Women shall have equal rights with men in all spheres of the State and public life.
metadata.title: Equal rights for women

metadata.chunk:
Article 29
                    Equality of opportunity
                    There shall be equality of opportunity for all citizens in respect of employment or office in the service of the Republic.
metadata.title: Equality of opportunity

metadata.chunk:
Article 31
                    Protection of law
                    To enjoy the protection of the law is the inalienable right of every citizen.
metadata.title: Protection of law

metadata.chunk:
Article 32
                    Right to life
                    No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty save in accordance with law.
metadata.title: Right to life

metadata.chunk:
Article 33
                    Safeguards as to arrest
                    No person shall be detained in custody without being informed of the grounds for such arrest.
metadata.title: Safeguards as to arrest

metadata.chunk:
Article 34
                    Forced labour
                    All forms of forced labour are prohibited and any contravention of this provision shall be an offence punishable in accordance with law.
metadata.title: Forced labour

metadata.chunk:
Article 35
                    Protection in respect of trial
                    No person shall be convicted of any offence except for violation of a law in force at the time of the commission of the act.
metadata.title: Protection in respect of trial

metadata.chunk:
Article 36
                    Freedom of movement
                    Subject to reasonable restrictions, every citizen shall have the right to move freely throughout Bangladesh.
metadata.title: Freedom of movement

metadata.chunk:
Article 37
                    Freedom of assembly
                    Every citizen shall have the right to assemble and participate in public meetings peacefully.
metadata.title: Freedom of assembly

metadata.chunk:
Article 38
                    Freedom of association
                    Every citizen shall have the right to form associations or unions.
metadata.title: Freedom of association

metadata.chunk:
Article 39
                    Freedom of thought and expression
                    Freedom of thought and conscience is guaranteed, as is freedom of speech and expression.
metadata.title: Freedom of thought and expression

metadata.chunk:
Article 40
                    Freedom of profession
                    Every citizen has the right to enter upon any lawful profession or occupation.
metadata.title: Freedom of profession

metadata.chunk:
Article 41
                    Freedom of religion
                    Every citizen has the right to profess, practice or propagate any religion.
metadata.title: Freedom of religion

metadata.chunk:
Article 42
                    Right to property
                    Every citizen shall have the right to acquire, hold, transfer or otherwise dispose of property.
metadata.title: Right to property

metadata.chunk:
Article 43
                    Protection of home
                    Every citizen shall have the right to be secure in his home against entry, search and seizure.
metadata.title: Protection of home

metadata.chunk:
Article 44
                    Enforcement of fundamental rights
                    The right to move the High Court Division for enforcement of fundamental rights is guaranteed.
metadata.title: Enforcement of fundamental rights
